name: Ubicloud
description: Open-source alternative to AWS providing IaaS on bare-metal providers like Hetzner plus GitHub Actions runners.

seo.title: Ubicloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Ubicloud: Open-source alternative to AWS providing IaaS on bare-metal providers like Hetzner plus GitHub Actions runners.

when_to_use: Open-source AWS alternative running on Hetzner bare-metal
Self-hosted GitHub Actions runners at lower cost than cloud
IaaS on commodity hardware without hyperscaler pricing
Managed Postgres and Kubernetes on your own servers via API
Community-run cloud for cost-sensitive open-source teams

pros: Cheaper GitHub Actions runners vs GitHub-hosted
Runs on commodity bare metal like Hetzner
cons: Young project; fewer services than AWS
No managed databases or higher-level PaaS yet
Self-hosting still requires real ops skill
review.verdict: Promising open-source IaaS, great for CI cost savings but not a full AWS replacement yet.
review.best_for: Teams cutting GitHub Actions bills or wanting open-source IaaS on Hetzner
review.not_for: Enterprises needing the full breadth of AWS managed services
